role_adherence_notes.linguistic: Correctly identified lack of linguistic evidence and remained silent.
role_adherence_notes.landscape: Focused on terrain, vegetation, and climate cues.
role_adherence_notes.botanics: Focused on plant species and biome types.
role_adherence_notes.regulatory: Focused on road markings, guardrails, and infrastructure.
role_adherence_notes.meta: Focused on camera generation, vehicle models, and cross-domain synthesis.

verdict.overall_verdict_notes: The pipeline failed to identify the ground truth (France/Reunion) because the specialists were heavily biased towards the United States (Hawaii) and Australia. The regulatory agent made a critical error by misidentifying the driving side (claiming right-hand traffic when the image shows left-hand traffic), which eliminated France from consideration. The final prediction of Australia was incorrect.

regulatory: Claimed 'Right-hand traffic flow' in Phase 1 evidence, contradicting the image which shows left-hand traffic.

visual_consistency_notes.landscape: Accurately described volcanic rock and tropical vegetation.
visual_consistency_notes.botanics: Accurately described palms and broadleaf foliage.
visual_consistency_notes.regulatory: Failed to accurately describe the driving side of the road.
visual_consistency_notes.meta: Accurately described camera generation and vehicle types.

tournament_failure.failure_reasoning: The ground truth (France) was not in the candidate pool. The pipeline eliminated it due to a hallucinated driving-side assessment by the regulatory agent.
